name: Transit Express Inc
districts_or_customers: Historically a subcontractor on Milwaukee County Transit Plus paratransit (MCTS); current MCTS paratransit prime is Transdev. No confirmed school district contracts.
recent_news: FMCSA MCS-150 updated 5/2025 shows 1 power unit and 2 drivers, active intrastate passenger authority (USDOT 728694, MC-333648). Small footprint with no recent M&A news.
website: none confirmed (D&B-listed website wedriveu.com appears to be an unrelated national operator)
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; tiny single-vehicle paratransit/NEMT shop in Milwaukee. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Distinctive Transportation
districts_or_customers: No confirmed school district or Medicaid contracts identified.
recent_news: No public news, web presence, or FMCSA passenger authority located. Address (10119 Hamilton Hills Ln, Fishers IN) is residential, suggesting micro/home-based operator.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~8 employees, no school contracts identified), no digital footprint. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Ngongo Non-Emergency Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely PA MATP (Medical Assistance Transportation Program) for Lackawanna County; no school district contracts identified.
recent_news: No recent news found; D&B lists Marc Ngongo as principal at 428 Railroad Ave #1, Scranton PA 18505.
fit_notes: Name explicitly indicates NEMT, not student transportation. Not a school-bus operator; not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Snow Country Limousine Inc
districts_or_customers: Resort and hospitality clients (Montage Deer Valley, Stein Eriksen Lodge, Waldorf Astoria Park City, Park City Mountain, Deer Valley Resort, Big Sky/Bozeman resorts). No school district contracts.
recent_news: Expanded to Big Sky, MT in 2020/2021 partnering with Montage hotel group; also serves Vail/Denver. Described as Utah's largest luxury transportation company.
fit_notes: Luxury limo/charter operator (SUVs, vans, coaches) for ski resorts and hospitality clients - NOT a school-bus or student-transport operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
